div1.entryFree: Ridge, the top of a long and narrow elevation: the wild waves, whose --s with the meeting clouds contend, Ven. 820. Lucr. 1439 (cf. Enridged). the frozen --s of the Alps, R2 I, 1, 64. in as high a flow as the r. of the gallows, H4A I, 2, 43. leads filled and --s (of roofs) horsed, Cor. II, 1, 227.
